scripts.check: prettier --check . && node scripts/check-license-headers.mjs && tsc -b --pretty false && node --check containers/agent-runner/runner.mjs && vitest run
scripts.deploy:development: wrangler deploy --config apps/model-broker/wrangler.jsonc && wrangler d1 migrations apply roundhouse-v2-development --remote --config apps/control-plane/wrangler.jsonc && wrangler deploy --config apps/control-plane/wrangler.jsonc
